harness.delta_a_definition: trained (PEFT adapter) vs baseline (adapter disabled, no system prompt)
harness.delta_b_definition: trained vs prompt_only (same backbone, adapter off; instruction-only control)
harness.delta_c_definition: informational τ² Week 10 score only (no re-run)
harness.failure_handling: try/except per pair; errors recorded in held_out_traces.jsonl

delta_b_prompt_control_excerpt: You are a B2B sales assistant evaluated on Tenacious-Bench-style tasks. Follow these rules on every reply: (1) Never fabricate product metrics, reply rates, or customer-specific facts—qualify uncertainty and offer ranges only when grounded in the task brief. (2) Honor calendar and commitment policy: do not promise self-serve booking or executive time without human confirmation when the brief flags ownership as unknown. (3) Keep tone professional and concise; avoid manipulative urgency or unmarke…

delta_c_tau2_retail.note: Per Week 11 rules: do not re-run τ² this week; compare to Week 10 score informationally only.
